stemHtml: What is the minimum Ground-Based Augmentation System (GBAS) plan coverage?

options.a: 15 NM from the landing threshold within 35° apart the final approach path and 10° apart between 15 and 20 NM.
options.b: 25 NM from the landing threshold within 45° apart the final approach path and 20° apart between 25 and 20 NM.
options.c: 25 NM from the landing threshold within 35° apart the final approach path and 10° apart between 25 and 30 NM.
options.d: 15 NM from the landing threshold within 45° apart the final approach path and 20° apart between 15 and 20 NM.
